Input: What does my footwear profile require? Is core attribute mandatory?
Expected:
The Footwear profile which is mapped to brick code 10001077 includes total of 31 attributes which includes 8 mandatory attributes related to product and GTIN. Product ID, Product Description, GTIN code and Description , Size Code and Color Code and description for both. Then there's  a set of 22 extended attributes as mandated by GS1 for this brick code, such as Heel Height, Shoe Type, Sole Type, Toe Shape, and Material information. It also requires one image ("Hero Shot"). Do you want me to provide list of all 22 extended attributes?

Regarding your question about core attributes: these are mandatory across the entire network by design. They are always required for every product, so they are included in all profiles.
Outcome:
The "Footwear" profile for *Shoes - General Purpose* (10001077) currently includes 22 extended attributes—such as Heel Height, Shoe Type, and Sole Type—along with one image requirement ("Hero Shot").

Regarding your question: Yes, core attributes are mandatory for all products. These include the baseline fields (Product ID, Product Description, GTIN details, NRF Size/Color codes, and Size/Color descriptions) which are required by design across the entire network.
